chapter_title.en: Seeking forgiveness through prayer after faults

text: ٢٩٩. وَقَالَ (عليه ‏السلام): مَا أَهَمَّنِي ذَنْبٌ أُمْهِلْتُ بَعْدَهُ حَتَّى أُصَلِّيَ رَكْعَتَيْنِ وَأسْأَلَ اللهَ الْعَافِيَة.

en.sayed-ali-raza: 299. Amīr al-mu’minīn, peace be upon him, said: I am not worried by a fault after which I get time to offer prayer in two units (rak‘ah) and beg safety from Allāh.
